item.title: This will forever be the greatest prank in existence.
item.description: This will never fail to make me laugh because imagine this, you are on a space ship in the middle of nowhere space, you turn your head and THEN YOU JUST SEE A GORILLA.
item.dc:creator: Wadef4

item.title: In Brazil, a drunk was lost and his own bull went to look for him and took him home
item.description: @ShawnPT : The accent is very hard to understand but it's something like "Here comes Apollo. He wanted to sell the bull and it's taking him home. He's drunk. It's no joke." Then the lady comments "The bull is taking him home, the bull knows." And the first guy asks if the bull is going to tuck him in as well.
item.dc:creator: Maroccan

item.title: Alligator Auschwitz - Thanks Miccosukee Nation
item.description:
Land Back Movement Betty Osceola No one does more to protect the Everglades more than the Miccosukee
https://nativenewsonline.net/sovereignty/federal-judge-halts-expansion-of-alligator-alcatraz-detention-site-in-everglades
item.dc:creator: AnonymousMockingjay

item.title: roach is my bestest boy
item.description:
(this is from an atomic shrimp scambaiting video. very underrated youtube channel. highly recommend)
been a while. read my book. it's free at rarust.com. roach is one of the main characters and these memes are all ones i saved because they reminded me of him. it's a good book. yes i know it's long. if you like what luigi did to that healthcare guy, you'll like the book.
item.dc:creator: rarust

item.title: But we are overreacting, right?
item.description: Viral edit: Be kind to each other and yourselves. We are in a marathon, not a sprint. Even small acts of resistance are still big. Even kindness is resistance. My heart hurts for this country. But being reminded that most of the resistance isn’t being televised yet still happening helps my heart a lot! Take breaks when you need to, and then stand up and fight some more. Remember- that obituary will come one day! Because I’m too tired to say anything else…here’s the sauce: https://www.nbcnews.com/news/asian-america/fort-bliss-japanese-americans-internment-camp-immigrant-detention-rcna226044?_branch_match_id=link-1486805193189646107&link_source=ta_first_comment&taid=68aa1ddf8c56710001ba0c7f&fbclid=IwQ0xDSwMXEitleHRuA2FlbQIxMQABHmutKivcPpmtXzmS9bO_vAGIy7oBMY_NoLnTyG3_mkKI7gv8JhhuQxIQKSri_aem_rPZ-cxgK1e5zXeAeqECfBg
item.dc:creator: TheSmellOfWineAndCheapPerfume

item.title: Age of Excess Dump #18 - 69 Days till Halloween
item.description:
Notifications are dead! Satan fired. Images, stretched, dozens of mobile users tilting their phones sideways just to get their folders menu to appear, TRULY THESE ARE THE END OF DAYS!!!
(Disclaimer: as always, I take no responsibility for the conditions of any of the crops, I just harvest them.)
item.dc:creator: LariCheltsy

item.title: What if American Psycho was wet?
item.dc:creator: HelloCasper

item.title: we needs hugs more than food
item.description: the dude in the white shirt was asking something like “what can I get for this much money? It’s all I have.” He was clearly embarrassed. The black shirt dude proceeded to cook a full meal, packed it up carefully just like for any other paying customer, then added some extras from the next flat grill. He handed over the food with a hug, refusing to take the money.
item.dc:creator: Grogu007

item.title: soothing Native American music
item.description: Sacred mountain flute Tony Duncan has heritage from the Apache and the Arikara, Hidatsa, and Mandan tribes of the Mandan-Hidatsa-Arikara Nation.

item.title: Go bloop bloop bloop

item.title: If you don’t pet Rex, he attacks you with his two nubbies
item.dc:creator: tampacl

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1452 (hot takes with kissinger)
item.description:
Let's get this bread.
Yesterday's expedition was successful! Fine birding was had. Mexican Jays were found, along with about a billion Wilson's Warblers. Oh, and a yellow-billed cuckoo.
Haven't edited all the photos I took yet, but I will, eventually: i did make a photo post of some other wildlife I've photographed, though.
I choose to say "clanker" with a Boston "R".
Number 4, for the record, is not a crow. I think it's a juvenile Moorhen.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "What are you doing?" ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 4) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride 5) Since multiple people have requested this over the last two weeks or so, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett
